videos.headline: Mercer Bears vs. Auburn Tigers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Mercer Bears vs. Auburn Tigers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mercer Bears vs. Auburn Tigers: Full Highlights) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Deuce Knight shines with six TDs in Auburn's blowout win vs. Mercer
videos.description: Knight posts 239 yards and two touchdowns on 15-for-20 passing while adding 162 yards and a ridiculous four touchdowns on the ground in the 62-17 win over the Bears.
